scripts.dev:gateway: nodemon --watch src --watch microservices --ignore uploads/* --ignore node_modules/* microservices/gateway/server.js
scripts.dev:auth: nodemon --watch src --watch microservices --ignore uploads/* --ignore node_modules/* microservices/auth-service/server.js
scripts.dev:tour: nodemon --watch src --watch microservices --ignore uploads/* --ignore node_modules/* microservices/tour-service/server.js
scripts.dev:booking: nodemon --watch src --watch microservices --ignore uploads/* --ignore node_modules/* microservices/booking-service/server.js
scripts.dev:payment: nodemon --watch src --watch microservices --ignore uploads/* --ignore node_modules/* microservices/payment-service/server.js
scripts.dev:wishlist: nodemon --watch src --watch microservices --ignore uploads/* --ignore node_modules/* microservices/wishlist-service/server.js
scripts.dev:review: nodemon --watch src --watch microservices --ignore uploads/* --ignore node_modules/* microservices/review-service/server.js
scripts.dev:upload: nodemon --watch src --watch microservices --ignore uploads/* --ignore node_modules/* microservices/upload-service/server.js
scripts.dev:chatbot: nodemon --watch src --watch microservices --ignore uploads/* --ignore node_modules/* microservices/chatbot-service/server.js
scripts.dev:staff: nodemon --watch src --watch microservices --ignore uploads/* --ignore node_modules/* microservices/staff-service/server.js
scripts.dev:admin: nodemon --watch src --watch microservices --ignore uploads/* --ignore node_modules/* microservices/admin-service/server.js
scripts.dev:micro: concurrently -k "npm run dev" "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:tour" "npm run dev:booking" "npm run dev:payment" "npm run dev:wishlist" "npm run dev:review" "npm run dev:upload" "npm run dev:chatbot" "npm run dev:staff" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:gateway"
scripts.start:micro: concurrently -k "npm run start" "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:tour" "npm run start:booking" "npm run start:payment" "npm run start:wishlist" "npm run start:review" "npm run start:upload" "npm run start:chatbot" "npm run start:staff" "npm run start:admin" "npm run start:gateway"
